title: Ion Chests (compat)
description: Quark/Iron Chests and other compatibility tweaks
body:
This mod provides compatibility between Quark's chest buttons/item search bar and non-vanilla/Quark chests, that is chests from other mods.

Supported mods:

- Charset Storage - Chests
- Iron Chests

Extra compatibility:

- Dropoff support for Charset Barrels

This project is visible source and can be considered proprietary for the time being - any resolution in this regard is reliant on [Quark/#736](https://github.com/Vazkii/Quark/issues/736).
